description: Panel A. Fraction of Active Funds with Mismatched Benchmarks, Panel B. Intensive Margin – Fraction of Active Funds from 2008 with Mismatched Benchmarks.Fig. 1. Panel A. Fraction of Active Funds with Mismatched Benchmarks. This figure shows the percent of active equity assets and the fraction of individual funds with mismatched benchmarks at the year-end over time. Panel B. Intensive Margin – Sub-Sample of Funds Existing in December 2008. This figure plots the same fractions as in Panel A for the sub-set of funds in existence in December 2008.
Fraction of Active Funds Benchmarked to the S&P 500.Fig. 2. This figure shows the equal weighted and the asset value-weighted averages of active funds benchmarked to the S&P 500 over time.

Fraction of Mismatched Funds Corrected Over Time.Fig. 3. Corrections by Mismatched Funds from December 2008 Over Time. This Fig. plots the fraction of funds with matched benchmarks over time among the mismatched funds in 2008.

Median Rolling % Flow Beta to Benchmark Adjusted Returns.Fig. 4. This figure shows the median 36-moth rolling regression coefficients of 12-month % Flows to equity funds against 36-month self-designated benchmark adjusted returns at the year-end for funds with correct benchmarks (solid line) and mismatched benchmarks (dashed line).
